heading: Consultation with Standards Board and Board of Advisors
label: 20987 Consultation with Standards Board and Board of Advisors
text: The Commission shall carry out its duties under this part in consultation with the Standards Board and the Board of Advisors.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15387 of Title 42
